data.body: This fun moth, a Grape Root Borer Moth, Vitacea polistiformis.  Landed on my leg a few years back and I was very glad I took the moment to look closely as it does a great job of Paper Wasp mimicry!  They are in the same subfamily, but lack the shrimp butts 😁
